description: Provenance + verification record for the Anchor (anchor-8) program-registry entries. Every entry's discHex is recompute-locked offline by skill/test/registry-discriminators.test.ts (discHex == sha256("global:"+ixName)[0..8]). This file records the canonical IDL each ixName was cross-checked against (snake_case ixName <-> camelCase IDL name), so the names are verified REAL, not just self-consistent. Re-verify with: SIGN_SAFE_RPC=<archival rpc> node --import tsx skill/corpus/verify-idls.ts
method: On-chain Anchor IDL account (PDA createWithSeed(findProgramAddress([],pid), "anchor:idl", pid)), zlib-inflated, instruction names compared snake<->camel against the registry ixNames. Drift's on-chain IDL account is stale (241 ix); its one name not in the on-chain copy was confirmed against the canonical GitHub master IDL.

programs.idl: on-chain (241 ix, stale) + GitHub master (drift-labs/protocol-v2 sdk/src/idl/drift.json, 249 ix)
programs.result: ALL VERIFIED (9 on-chain; admin_withdraw_from_insurance_fund_vault via canonical GitHub master IDL)

totals.note: 60 dangerous+safe ixNames across the 5 Jupiter/Raydium/Orca/Kamino/Drift targets verified; recompute test additionally locks every anchor-8 discHex across all 14 registry programs.
